creator: bms@spc.org
text:
Whilst building glade, gnomevfs dependency does not pick up on
	gnomelibs, which it requires for the gnome-config script.

Fix: 

Install gnomelibs before gnomevfs, or manually patch the dependency
	into the Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: 	Attempt to build glade without installing gnomelibs first.
